summary: Tested new Profile screen, City Picker, Night Summary API, and Push Notification features. All backend APIs pass (8/8). Profile screen renders correctly with all elements. City picker modal works with search. Night Summary AI response works. Critical issue: AsyncStorage fails on web preview (Native module is null), so profile settings cannot be persisted across sessions on web.

integration_issues.issue: AsyncStorageError: Native module is null, cannot access legacy storage. Profile data (name, city, language, nightSummaryEnabled) cannot be persisted on web preview. Saving profile throws error caught silently. Dashboard greeting won't show user name on web.
After save, router.back() may not navigate to dashboard if no history exists (opened profile directly via URL). Works from dashboard nav flow.

react_native_issues.issue: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 installed but expected version is 2.2.0 per expo compatibility. Also, AsyncStorage does not work on web (Native module is null). Need to add localStorage fallback for web platform.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix AsyncStorage for web — add Platform.OS === 'web' check in useUserProfile.ts and use localStorage as fallback. This blocks profile persistence on web preview.
AsyncStorage package version mismatch: installed 3.0.2, expected 2.2.0 — run 'yarn add @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@2.2.0'
critical_code_review_comments: useUserProfile.ts: No web fallback for AsyncStorage. On web, AsyncStorage throws 'Native module is null'. Need: `import { Platform } from 'react-native'; if (Platform.OS === 'web') use localStorage, else use AsyncStorage`
server.py line 653-670: APScheduler startup/shutdown uses deprecated @app.on_event() — consider migrating to lifespan context manager (FastAPI recommends this), though not breaking currently

success_rate.frontend: 85% - All UI elements render and interact correctly, Night Summary modal works, City Picker works, Language toggle works. Profile persistence fails on web due to AsyncStorage.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile screen UI works correctly. City search/select works. Language toggle works. Night summary API returns AI text and modal displays correctly. Dashboard shows profile-aware greeting (profile.name). The only critical issue is AsyncStorage not working on web — needs localStorage fallback in useUserProfile.ts hook. Backend APIs all pass.
rca_of_issue: AsyncStorage web failure RCA: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage relies on a native module that doesn't exist in web environments. The useUserProfile hook calls AsyncStorage.getItem/setItem unconditionally. Fix: check Platform.OS === 'web' and use window.localStorage instead. Example: `const storage = Platform.OS === 'web' ? { getItem: (k) => Promise.resolve(localStorage.getItem(k)), setItem: (k,v) => Promise.resolve(localStorage.setItem(k,v)) } : AsyncStorage`
